sys_script_include.name: CCSFlowSwitchByDT

sys_update_version.name: sys_script_include_e2c40b800febba102e576dd530d1b20f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_846092_test.CCSFlowSwitchByDT</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>true</client_callable><description/><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>CCSFlowSwitchByDT</name><sandbox_callable>true</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var CCSFlowSwitchByDT = Class.create();
CCSFlowSwitchByDT.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},

    /**
     * Record Producer対応版：有効なCCS/Flowを取得
     * @param {String} rpSysId Record ProducerのSys ID（任意）
     * @return {Object} 各CCS/FlowのSys ID
     */
    getActiveItems: function(rpSysId) {
        var result = {
            u_reco_pro_id: '',
            u_script_name: '',
            u_flow_name: ''
        };

        try {
            var dtAPI = new sn_dt.DecisionTableAPI();
            var inputs = {
                u_date: new GlideDate(),
				u_type:'script'

            };


            // Decision Table:flow_and_script_decision_test実行
            var decisionResult = dtAPI.getDecision({
                decisionTableSysId: '12d9e3d90fab36502e576dd530d1b25b',
                inputs: inputs
            });

            // 結果抽出
            if (decisionResult && decisionResult.outputs) {
                result.ccs_onload_sys_id = decisionResult.outputs.u_onload_script_name || '';
                result.ccs_onchange_sys_id = decisionResult.outputs.u_onchange_name || '';
                result.ccs_onsubmit_sys_id = decisionResult.outputs.u_submit_name || '';
                result.flow_sys_id = decisionResult.outputs.u_submit_name || '';
            }
        } catch (e) {
            gs.error('CCSFlowSwitchByDTエラー：' + e.message);
            this._setDefaultValues(result); // デフォルト値設定
        }
        return result;
    },

    // デフォルト値設定メソッド（省略）
    _setDefaultValues: function(result) {
        result.ccs_onload_sys_id = 'DEFAULT_ONLOAD_SYS_ID';
        result.ccs_onchange_sys_id = 'DEFAULT_ONCHANGE_SYS_ID';
        result.ccs_onsubmit_sys_id = 'DEFAULT_ONSUBMIT_SYS_ID';
        result.flow_sys_id = 'DEFAULT_FLOW_SYS_ID';
    },

    type: 'CCSFlowSwitchByDT'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-06 07:02:03</sys_created_on><sys_id>e2c40b800febba102e576dd530d1b20f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>3</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CCSFlowSwitchByDT</sys_name><sys_package display_value="test" source="x_846092_test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_package><sys_policy>read</sys_policy><sys_scope display_value="test">9971d5aa0f9372102e576dd530d1b235</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_e2c40b800febba102e576dd530d1b20f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-10 07:26:59</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
